item.title: The poor Starbucks employee didn’t realize the pup cup was for a cat when I ordered, so they gave him a huge cup and said he deserves it (Don’t worry. I didn’t give him the whole thing) #pupcupstarbucks #greycatsoftiktok #greycat

item.title: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a
item.description: By @malpluscats: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a

item.title: “Aggressive” Bruno’s 1-month Transformation 💫 It’s so hard to believe that this is the same cat I brought home. The first few weeks with Bruno were overwhelming. I felt hopeless at times. Even with my experience with feral & aggressive cats, Bruno has bee
